scripts.build: npm --workspace @little/shared run build && npm --workspace @little/api run build && npm --workspace @little/worker run build && npm --workspace @little/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @little/shared run build && npm --workspace @little/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @little/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @little/worker run typecheck && npm --workspace @little/web run typecheck
